input: simplify for patient: Patient Name Rahul Sharma Age 32 Diagnosis mild viral fever headache body pain Prescription Tab Paracetamol 500 mg 1 tablet three times daily after food 5 days Cap Amoxicillin 250 mg 1 capsule twice daily after food 7 days Tab Cetirizine 10 mg 1 tablet at night 5 days Advice Drink plenty of fluids rest Follow-up 5 days
output:
Patient: Rahul Sharma | Age: 32

What you have: You have a mild viral fever with headache and body pain.

Your medicines:
- Paracetamol 500mg (fever and pain relief): 1 tablet, 3 times daily after food, for 5 days
- Amoxicillin 250mg (antibiotic): 1 capsule, 2 times daily after food, for 7 days
- Cetirizine 10mg (cold relief): 1 tablet at night, for 5 days

Advice: Drink lots of water. Rest well. Come back after 5 days if still sick.

input: simplify for patient: Essential hypertension BP 150/90. Tab Amlodipine 5mg od morning. Tab Losartan 50mg od. Low sodium diet. Regular BP monitoring. Review 1 month.
output:
You have high blood pressure (150/90).

Medicines:
- Amlodipine 5mg (lowers blood pressure): 1 tablet every morning
- Losartan 50mg (lowers blood pressure): 1 tablet every morning

Advice: Eat less salt. Check BP regularly. Come back after 1 month.

input: simplify for patient: Type 2 Diabetes FBS 180. Tab Metformin 500mg bid pc. Tab Glimepiride 1mg od before breakfast. HbA1c after 3 months. Avoid sugar sweets.
output:
You have diabetes (blood sugar is high at 180).

Medicines:
- Metformin 500mg (lowers blood sugar): 1 tablet, 2 times daily after food
- Glimepiride 1mg (lowers blood sugar): 1 tablet before breakfast

Advice: Get HbA1c blood test after 3 months. Avoid sugar and sweets.

input: simplify for patient: Acute gastroenteritis vomiting loose stools. Tab Ondansetron 4mg tid. ORS 200ml after every loose stool. Bland diet. Avoid spicy oily food.
output:
You have a stomach infection with vomiting and loose motions.

Medicines:
- Ondansetron 4mg (stops vomiting): 1 tablet, 3 times daily
- ORS: Drink 1 glass after every loose motion

Advice: Eat plain food like rice and curd. Avoid spicy and oily food.

input: simplify for patient: Acute tonsillitis. Tab Amoxicillin 500mg tid for 7 days. Tab Ibuprofen 400mg tid pc. Warm saline gargles qid. Review 5 days.
output:
You have an infected throat (tonsils).

Medicines:
- Amoxicillin 500mg (antibiotic): 1 tablet, 3 times daily for 7 days
- Ibuprofen 400mg (pain relief): 1 tablet, 3 times daily after food

Advice: Gargle with warm salt water 4 times daily. Come back after 5 days.

input: simplify for patient: Urinary tract infection. Tab Ciprofloxacin 500mg bid for 5 days. Fluid intake 3L per day. Avoid caffeine.
output:
You have a urine infection.

Medicines:
- Ciprofloxacin 500mg (antibiotic): 1 tablet, 2 times daily for 5 days

Advice: Drink at least 3 litres of water daily. Avoid tea and coffee.

input: simplify for patient: Migraine. Tab Sumatriptan 50mg stat at onset. Tab Propranolol 40mg od prevention. Avoid bright light loud noise stress.
output:
You have migraine headaches.

Medicines:
- Sumatriptan 50mg (stops migraine): Take 1 tablet immediately when headache starts
- Propranolol 40mg (prevents migraines): 1 tablet once daily

Advice: Avoid bright lights, loud noises, and stress.

input: simplify for patient: Bronchial asthma. Budesonide inhaler 200mcg bid. Salbutamol inhaler 2 puffs prn. Tab Montelukast 10mg hs. Avoid cold air dust smoke.
output:
You have asthma.

Medicines:
- Budesonide inhaler (prevents attacks): 2 puffs, 2 times daily
- Salbutamol inhaler (emergency): 2 puffs when breathing is difficult
- Montelukast 10mg (prevents attacks): 1 tablet at night

Advice: Avoid cold air, dust, and smoke.

input: simplify for patient: Iron deficiency anemia. Tab Ferrous sulfate 200mg bid. Tab Folic acid 5mg od. Vitamin C foods. Avoid tea with iron tablets.
output:
You have low iron in your blood (anemia).

Medicines:
- Ferrous sulfate 200mg (iron tablets): 1 tablet, 2 times daily
- Folic acid 5mg: 1 tablet once daily

Advice: Eat vitamin C rich foods like oranges. Do not take iron tablets with tea or coffee.

input: simplify for patient: Hypothyroidism TSH 12. Tab Levothyroxine 50mcg od empty stomach. TSH after 6 weeks. Lifelong medication.
output:
Your thyroid gland is underactive.

Medicines:
- Levothyroxine 50mcg (thyroid hormone): 1 tablet every morning on empty stomach

Advice: Get TSH blood test after 6 weeks. You will need this medicine for life.
